issues.description: Action type is 'RevealFromHand' but card text says 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck' — should be 'RevealFromDeck' or similar deck-reveal action, not hand reveal
Missing placement logic: revealed card must be placed at top or bottom of deck. Current DSL has no action for this placement choice
Conditional [Rush] grant is missing: 'GiveKeyword' should only trigger IF revealed card's type includes 'Whitebeard Pirates'. Current DSL grants Rush unconditionally
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for '[during this turn]', but the condition check must be added first before the keyword action fires
